home_title: What shall we improve today, my friend?
assistant_agent_selected: {name} selected. Start the dialogue and the conversation continues in the Telegram bot.
assistant_dialog_only_in_telegram: The dialogue can only be started inside the Telegram Mini App opened from this bot.
memento_title_no_date: Birth date will come from registration
memento_title_future: The date has not arrived yet
memento_text_no_date: If there is no date yet, enter it here. That is {total} weeks until {years} years.
memento_text_future: Choose a birth date in the past to see the life calendar.
memento_text_passed: Every next day is already a bonus. Use it honestly.
goal_title: Goal for this stage of life
goal_placeholder: For example: finish an important project by Friday
goal_set_toast: Goal set. I will remind you every day until you close it.
diary_subtitle: Write down decisions, thoughts, and one honest conclusion of the day.
diary_prompt_postpone: What am I putting off as if there were infinite time?
diary_prompt_oneact: What one act would make this week worthy?
diary_empty_text: Start with one honest observation: what deserves your time today?
diary_saved_toast: Entry saved. It is no longer just a thought, but a trace of your path.
memory_hint: Add it so Marcus advises more precisely
pro_desc: Pro turns Marcus into a personal system of memory, decisions, and deep self-analysis.
